description: §45.5 clean neg — comparing `==` against a UNIT (payload-free) enum variant (`@phase == Phase.Idle`, where `Idle` carries no payload) SHALL NOT fire W-EQ-PAYLOAD-VARIANT. Unit variants lower to a string tag and compare normally, so the always-false lint does not apply. `notCodes` asserts W-EQ-PAYLOAD-VARIANT stays silent (contrast with `equality/payload-variant-compare-warn`).
rationale: §45.7: W-EQ-PAYLOAD-VARIANT targets only payload-bearing variant CONSTRUCTORS; a unit variant (`Phase.Idle`) is a string tag and compares as a value, so the comparison is meaningful and the lint does not fire.
